feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Create a Welcome email when a new employee is hired with time schedule to send after 24h after hired
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is it possible to create a Welcome email when a new employee is hired format the message text and set a time parameter so that it is sent 24 hours after the employee is added to the system?


Employee Central - SuccessFactors doubts

Kind regards,
Miss Jo

entry.title: SF_COM_Compa_Ratio_and_Range_Penetration_v2.0 merges compa ratio from multiple employee assignments
entry.content:
Hello,

The named SAP template provides a merged result of compa ratio from multiple assignments (both active & inactive) employee has.
Employment Status filter in Query or in report page does not allow to filter out inactive employees (that would include inactive assignments as well). Using that filter results in timing out the session in browser or making an error and not allowing to save the filter setting.
If anyone has experienced similar situation, how did you resolve it?

Tadas

entry.title: SAP Success Factors: where to find Master Picklists in SAP Software Download Center?
entry.content:
Can anybody guide me through this? I can land into a page from that link, but there are no picklists to browse. Am I searching it wrong?  Thank you in advance! 

/Browse/Courses/SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy/Importing a Picklist in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: nationalId from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to Microsoft Entra ID
entry.content:
Hi experts

We try to get nationalId synced to Microsoft Entra ID through the SuccessFactors, but are having a hard time getting the JSON path API Expression correct. 
We have extracted the value through Postman, using this query:
api55.sapsf.eu/odata/v2/EmpEmployment?$format=JSON&$expand=personNav,personNav/nationalIdNav&$filter=personIdExternal eq 'XXXXXXXX'

$.personNav.nationalIdNav.results[?(@.cardType == nationalId)].nationalId
$.personNav.nationalIdNav..results[?(@.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'A' || @.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'U' || @.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'P')])].nationalId
$.personNav.nationalIdNav.results[0].nationalId
$.nationalIdNav.results[?(@.cardType == 'BN')].nationalId

none of the return any value. I reckon permissions should be okay as we are able to retrieve in OData API with Postman. 

Have anybody been able to retrieve this value?

entry.title: Integration approach for existing (“green”) SmartRecruiters customers
entry.content:
Hello community,
 
We are currently supporting several clients who are existing SmartRecruiters customers (“green” clients), and who are now planning to implement SAP SuccessFactors (Employee Central and potentially Onboarding).
 
At this stage, we understand that these customers are not eligible for the new productized integrations / standard connectors being released in 2026 as part of the SAP–SmartRecruiters partnership. We therefore need to define an alternative integration approach based on custom integrations. Our objective is to replicate the main integration flows typically covered by the productized integration, including:
- User Sync (creation, update, deactivation)
- Foundation / Organizational Data Sync (e.g., Departments, Locations, Legal Entities, etc.)
- Job Sync / Job Creation (from SAP SuccessFactors or external initiation)
- Hire Sync (from SmartRecruiters to Employee Central and potentially SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding)
 
In this context, we would like to understand:
 
1. What is the recommended integration approach for such “green” customers today?
2. Are there supported API-based patterns or reference architectures that we should follow?
3. Are there any known limitations or constraints compared to the productized integration? 4. Are there preferred tools or approaches (e.g., middleware, specific APIs, SCIM for users, etc.)?
5. Are there any existing implementation examples or best practices that can be shared? We are currently responding to active RFPs and need to propose a reliable and supported architecture to our clients. Any guidance or documentation would be highly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Reporting: Creating a User Report with Assigned job Attributes
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to create a user report with assigned job attributes in Manage Job Profile -> Job Classifications and in Job Profile Content? For example, I would like to create a report with these fields:

User ID, Name, Hire Date, Status, Cost Center, Job Code, Title, Grade, FLSA (Job Classification),  grade range (Job Classification), Job Family (Job Profile Content).

Help with building a Story Report would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: BIB Replicating departments from EC to HCM, changing the OBJID
entry.content:
So i need to replicate both Employees and Organizational Objets from SAP SF EC to SAP HCM, but i need the Ids to come from a specific field and not the IDs in SuccessFactors , for the Employee and it's PERNR i used IF_ECPAO_IN_EXT_PERNR_MAP, but now i'm trying to find a similar solution for Org Objs is there a BADi that allows that ? or any other way ?
I would really appreciate the help.

entry.title: Check Tool (COC) - DuplicateCompetencyNameCheck
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While we are in the process of migrating to Talent Intelligence Hub, and working on with the check tool, an error for center of capabilities section appears particularly DuplicateCompetencyNameCheck.

There are duplicates on the competency that we need to resolve.

For this, if there are many duplicate items, may I know how the process is done now via imports? I am not sure if there are changes but I am getting error with the correction via import.

Since there are several items, manually editing not applicable.

Thank you very much!

 

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Unable to Enroll in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Practice System (HR811)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Learning Support Team,

I am trying to enroll in the Hands-on Practice for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Administration (HR811) practice system through SAP Learning. However, I am unable to access or enroll in the practice system.

While attempting to enroll, I receive the following error message:

"Temporarily restricted – Access temporarily restricted due to maintenance. If the problem continues, Contact Support."

I have been facing this issue for some time and am unable to proceed with my practice sessions. I have already verified my subscription and tried accessing the system multiple times, but the issue still persists.

Could you please check the status of the practice system and help me gain access or provide an estimated timeline for when the system will be available again?

Details:

  • Course/Practice System: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Administration
  • Practice System ID: HR811
  • SAP Learning Account Email: santhoshsapsf15@gmail.com

I have attached a screenshot of the error message for your reference.

Your assistance in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

Best Regards,
SanthoshKrishnan T
Email: santhoshsapsf15@gmail.com

entry.title: CWK Paused
entry.content:
Good Morning

We are looking into possibilities of pausing CWK contracts in the middle, more like breaking the employment during contractual period, an example lets say an employee signed a 12 months contract but we dont expect them to work on the 6th month, they should resume work on the 7th month, is there a way of achieving, not through a work order but event reasons?

Your help will be appriciated

Regards

Thabo

entry.title: WorkforcePerson Integration from SF to S4 HANA via MDI
entry.content:
We have a Requirement to Store the "Position" in S4 HANA Public Cloud from SF through MDI. In SuccessFactors we have the standard Field called  "Position" and same receiving to MDI. 

SAP GROW don't have any standard "Position" and Created a Custom Field and we are Implemented  the BADI WFD_MDI_EXT_FIELD_MAPPING, its working , whereas our actual Requirement is Standard Read the Field of MDI.

Can somebody help us how to proceed with this requirement?

entry.title: REHIRE WITH OLD EMPLOYMENT REPLICATION TO ECP
entry.content:
Currently, rehiring old employees processed via 'Rehire with Old Employment' replicate to EC Payroll prematurely before the 'Manage Pending Hires' workflow is completed. Since this happens before the hire is officially approved and saved in Employee Central, it poses a high risk of payroll errors.

Expected as per KBA - 3736423 - How to identify and stop the data replication from happening for rehires(ROOE) whose MPH is not completed - Onboarding

I see that there is also influence on this - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/346208/?section=sectionDetails

or those who have encountered this scenario with EC Payroll integration, may I ask:

  • What workarounds or processes are you currently using to prevent premature replication for rehiring old employees?

  • Are there any manual steps or configuration adjustments you perform in 'Manage Pending Hires' to mitigate this issue until the hire is officially saved in Employee Central?

Any insights  practices you can share would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Buttons in Integration Centre seem cut off - any ideos how to resolve?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For some time, the buttons in the Integration Center (such as “Set Schedule”, “Run Now”, etc.) have appeared partially cut off by the page layout.

It cannot be resolved through browser zoom, because the buttons are only fully visible at a zoom level of -50%, at which point all other text becomes completely unreadable.

Even scrolling to the bottom of the page does not display the buttons in full, it seems the page layout itself is configured this way. The issue occurs regardless of how large or small the browser window is.

I’m aware this is just a minor visual issue, but it still annoys me every time I navigate in the Integration Center. Does anyone have an idea how this could be fixed? Are there any browser settings or configuration changes I could try?

Thanks & Kind regards

Julia

entry.title: How do you represent EOR workers in SuccessFactors Employee Central?
entry.content:
We’re reviewing how to represent overseas workers in SuccessFactors Employee Central when they are not employed through one of our own local legal entities. In our case, we use an employer of record provider, Globalization Partners, for workers in countries where we do not currently have an entity. The employment contract, local payroll, and country-specific employment administration are handled outside our normal company structure.

My question is how other teams usually represent these workers in Employee Central.
We do not necessarily want to manage them in the same way as standard employees, because the employment and payroll side is handled by the EOR. At the same time, we still need some internal visibility for manager hierarchy, org charts, cost center reporting, learning assignments, project staffing, access provisioning, and workforce planning. The part I am trying to think through is how to avoid making EOR workers look like regular employees under a legal entity where we are not actually registered, while also not keeping them completely outside SuccessFactors and losing visibility in reporting and workflows.

How did you handle this kind of setup in Employee Central? Did you use a separate worker type, employment classification, legal entity approach, or another structure?

entry.title: Workforce Replication from Employee Central to SAP Master Data Integration - Removal of Fields
entry.content:
Dear SuccessFactors Community,
I came across the standard integration between SuccessFactors Employee Central and SAP Master Data Integration to replicate the workforce (Admin Center -> Business Scenarios). When testing the integration, I saw that the payload from SuccessFactors also includes certain data fields like e.g. Personal E-Mail that I don't want to be sent and stored in SAP Master Data Integration. Is there any way to configure in SuccessFactors that this data is not sent to SAP MDI?

Dominik

entry.title: Transitioning from 6+ Years of Recruitment/TA to SAP SuccessFactors Consultant — Need Guidance
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have 6+ years of experience in Recruitment and Talent Acquisition and have recently earned my SAP SuccessFactors certifications in EC, RCM, and PMGM.

I am based in India and actively looking to transition into SAP SF consulting. I would love guidance on:

1. Where to apply — SAP partners, Big 4, boutique HCM firms?
2. How to get real-time project experience without prior implementation history?
3. Should I lead with my TA/Recruitment domain expertise, especially for RCM roles?
4. Any India-specific job boards, communities, or LinkedIn tips?

I know certifications alone are not enough — I am looking for a realistic roadmap from people who have made this transition.

Any advice or direction is genuinely appreciated!

@SuccessFactors #SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central #SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting, and #SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals.

entry.title: Import Story Report from Content Store Faied
entry.content:
I tried importing a Story Report from the Content Store but it failed with this error "Error: This report has been imported previously. A Story with the same ID already exists in the system. Existing report name: SF_XM_My_Team_Dashboard_v2.0"

I tried importing with and without selecting "Selecting this checkbox will overwrite the previously imported Story" option but both failed.

Anyone know how I can find this report in my system?

entry.title: Hide Award Configuration Fields from Workflow Approval Page of Reward and Recognition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Issue:

When a Spot Award is initiated by the nominator, it goes through multiple approvers in the workflow. During this process, approvers can view additional details such as the Budget Holder and Spot Award Program Details by clicking the related button.

Currently, this visibility cannot be controlled using Permissions or MDF configurations, as these settings are required for both the Nominee and Nominator roles.

 

Question:

Is there any way to hide the Budget Holder and Spot Award Program Details from being visible on the workflow approval page, without impacting the required access for the Nominee and Nominator?

@xavierlegarrec - Please suggest

entry.title: Change audit for workflows?
entry.content:
Hi SF Community,

Is anyone aware of change audit reporting on SuccessFactors workflows?   There does not seem to be anything built into the system - the only information available in the UI is the date/time of the most recent change, and the name of the person who made the change.

There's no information on what changed at that time, or any history of previous changes.

Lacking any system audit, has anyone found a manual method that satisfies your internal and external audit team?

Thanks in advance for any info you can share!

Ricardo Rojas

entry.title: Problems with Hands on practice SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Position Management
entry.content: @Gopinath_Murugaiyan Hi! I was wondering if there is any technical problem with the hands-on practice for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Position Management THR79? I'm trying to complete it before the first certification attempt, but it's not working. Appreciating that you can help me. Thanks!
